ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "checking_balance" TEXT /* Applicant's checking account balance */,
  "months_loan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Applicant's credit history */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Loan amount requested */,
  "savings_balance" TEXT /* Applicant's savings account balance */,
  "employment_length" TEXT /* Applicant's employment length */,
  "installment_rate" INTEGER /* Installment rate as a percentage of disposable income */,
  "personal_status" TEXT /* Applicant's personal status (e.g., single male, female) */,
  "other_debtors" TEXT /* Other debtors or guarantors */,
  "residence_history" INTEGER /* Applicant's residence history in years */,
  "property" TEXT /* Type of property owned */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Applicant's age */,
  "installment_plan" TEXT /* Installment plan (e.g., none, bank, stores) */,
  "housing" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., own, rent, for free) */,
  "existing_credits" INTEGER /* Number of existing credits at the bank */,
  "job" TEXT /* Applicant's job (e.g., skilled employee, unskilled resident) */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Applicant's telephone availability */,
  "foreign_worker" TEXT /* Applicant's foreign worker status */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Default status (1 for default, 0 for no default) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan application was submitted */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, car, home) */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the applicants table */,
  "co_signer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the co_signers table */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the loan_officers table */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (e.g., insufficient credit score, high debt-to-income ratio) */,
  "loan_account_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the loan_accounts table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_co_signer_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_signer_id") REFERENCES co_signers ("co_signer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_job FOREIGN KEY ("job") REFERENCES jobs ("job_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("loan_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_installment_plan FOREIGN KEY ("installment_plan") REFERENCES installment_plans ("plan_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_property FOREIGN KEY ("property") REFERENCES properties ("property_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_account_id") REFERENCES loan_accounts ("loan_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_housing FOREIGN KEY ("housing") REFERENCES housing_types ("housing_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_employment_length FOREIGN KEY ("employment_length") REFERENCES employment_lengths ("length_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_credit_history FOREIGN KEY ("credit_history") REFERENCES credit_history ("history_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_personal_status FOREIGN KEY ("personal_status") REFERENCES personal_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES loan_purposes ("purpose_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history status */,
  "history_name" TEXT /* Name of the credit history status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the credit history status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment length */,
  "length_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment length */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment length */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personal_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personal status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the personal status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the personal status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installment plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the installment plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the installment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_types" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing type */,
  "housing_name" TEXT /* Name of the housing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the housing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Applicant's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Applicant's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Applicant's date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Applicant's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Applicant's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Applicant's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Applicant's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Applicant's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Applicant's zip code */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Applicant's Social Security Number */,
  "employment_details" TEXT /* Applicant's employment details (e.g., company, position, salary) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Applicant's credit score */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Applicant's marital status */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_signers" (
  "co_signer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-signer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Co-signer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Co-signer's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Co-signer's date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Co-signer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Co-signer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Co-signer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Co-signer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Co-signer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Co-signer's zip code */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Co-signer's Social Security Number */,
  "employment_details" TEXT /* Co-signer's employment details (e.g., company, position, salary) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Co-signer's credit score */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Co-signer's marital status */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_signer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Loan officer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Loan officer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Loan officer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Loan officer's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Loan officer's department */,
  "role" TEXT /* Loan officer's role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Loan officer's access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_accounts" (
  "loan_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan account */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the loan_applications table */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, car, home) */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Loan amount */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate */,
  "loan_term_months" INTEGER /* Loan term in months */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the loan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., active, closed, in arrears) */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment */,
  "total_payments_made" INTEGER /* Total payments made */,
  "total_interest_paid" TEXT /* Total interest paid */,
  "remaining_balance" TEXT /* Remaining balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_accounts_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "loan_account_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the loan_accounts table */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, disbursement, late fee) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "balance_after_transaction" TEXT /* Balance after the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_transactions_loan_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_account_id") REFERENCES loan_accounts ("loan_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the applicants table */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the loan_officers table */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, in-person meeting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("loan_officer_id")
)
